description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run tests that runs on every push. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-2019, windows-latest, macos-latest) and Python versions (3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install pytest and project dependencies, and run pytest.
